Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Aug-12-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephen Williams (Personal Representative) in Propria Persona.

The Court questions how much of the reserve is at risk with the Internal Revenue Service. Mr. Williams stated that he was advised by the CPA that the statute of limitations will run until February of 2020, that the Beneficiary requested that he hold the entire amount, that the whole amount is at risk and that Planned Parenthood returned the check to him. Status of the reserve account is continued to August 12, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.
